title: 八拍蛮
author: 孙光宪
content:
孔雀尾拖金线长
怕人飞起入丁香
越女沙头争拾翠
相呼归去背斜阳
translation:
A peacock's tail drags, gold threads long
Afraid people will fly into the lilac
Girls on the sand vie to gather kingfisher feathers
Calling each other home, backs to the setting sun
annotation: Peacocks, gold threads, girls gathering feathers. They call each other home as the sun sets.孙光宪 paints a tropical paradise.

title: 浣溪沙
author: 孙光宪
content:
蓼岸风多橘柚香
江边一望楚天长
片帆烟际闪孤光
目送征鸿飞杳杳
思随流水去茫茫
兰红波碧忆潇湘
translation:
Reed shore, much wind, orange and pomelo fragrance
By the river, one gaze, Chu sky long
A single sail in the mist, flashing lone light
Eyes following the wild geese, flying far, far
Thoughts following the flowing water, vast, vast
Orchid red, wave blue, remembering Xiao and Xiang
annotation: Wind, citrus fragrance, a lone sail. He watches geese disappear and his thoughts follow the river. The colors — red orchids, blue waves — are the colors of memory.

title: 风流子
author: 孙光宪
content:
茅舍槿篱溪曲
鸡犬自南自北
菰叶长
水葓开
门外春波涨绿
听织
声促
轧轧鸣梭穿屋
translation:
Thatched hut, hibiscus fence, river bend
Chickens and dogs, south and north
Wild rice leaves long
Water pepper flowers open
Outside the gate, spring waves rise green
Listen to weaving
Sound urgent
Clack-clack, the shuttle pierces the house
annotation: A farm by a river. Chickens, dogs, wild rice, weaving. The shuttle's sound 'pierces the house' — you can hear the work, the life, the rhythm.

title: 谒金门
author: 孙光宪
content:
留不得
留得也应无益
白纻春衫如雪色
扬州初去日
translation:
Can't stay
Even if I stayed, it would be no use
White ramie spring jacket like snow
The day I first left Yangzhou
annotation: He can't stay. Even if he could, it wouldn't help. He remembers leaving Yangzhou in a white jacket. Some goodbyes are inevitable.

title: 思帝乡
author: 孙光宪
content:
如何
遣情情更多
永日水晶帘下
敛羞蛾
translation:
How?
Sending away feelings, feelings only increase
All day, beneath the crystal curtain
Knitting her shy brows
annotation: She tries to send away her feelings. They only multiply. All day she sits behind the curtain, frowning. The harder you try not to feel, the more you feel.

title: 清平乐
author: 孙光宪
content:
愁肠欲断
正是青春半
连理分枝鸾失伴
又是一场离散
translation:
Sorrowful intestines about to break
It's exactly mid-spring
Joined branches split, the phoenix loses its mate
Another round of separation
annotation: Mid-spring, and they're apart. The phoenix has lost its mate. 'Another round' — this isn't the first time. The repetition makes it worse.

title: 菩萨蛮
author: 孙光宪
content:
小庭花落无人扫
疏香满地东风老
春晚信沉沉
天涯何处寻
translation:
Small courtyard, flowers fall, no one sweeps
Sparse fragrance covers the ground, east wind aging
Spring evening, letters heavy
At the edge of the sky, where to search?
annotation: Flowers fall, no one sweeps. The wind is aging. No letters from far away. The courtyard is a metaphor for her heart — full of things no one tends.

title: 虞美人
author: 孙光宪
content:
红窗寂寂无人语
暗淡梨花雨
轻罗小扇掩朱唇
肠断因春
肠断因春
translation:
Red window, silent, no one to talk to
Dim, pear blossom rain
Light silk small fan covering vermilion lips
Heartbroken because of spring
Heartbroken because of spring
annotation: Silent window, rain, a fan covering her mouth. 'Heartbroken because of spring' — repeated for emphasis. Spring is supposed to be happy. Why does it hurt so much?

title: 生查子
author: 孙光宪
content:
暖日策花骢
亸鞚垂杨陌
芳草艳阳晴
忆得年时踏青
嘶骑渐远
何处认郎踪
translation:
Warm day, whip the dapple horse
Reins drooping, willow road
Fragrant grass, bright sun, clear
Remembering the year's spring outing
The neighing horse gradually far
Where to recognize his traces?
annotation: A spring day, a horse, willows. She remembers last year's outing. Now the horse is far away, and she can't find him. The road that was full is now empty.

title: 酒泉子
author: 孙光宪
content:
曲槛柳浓
窣地春衫宫样
倚阑干
倾鬓黛
脸波春
translation:
Curved railing, willow thick
Sweeping the ground, spring jacket, palace style
Leaning on the railing
Tilting temple brows
Face waves of spring
annotation: Willows, a palace-style jacket, a woman leaning on a railing. 'Face waves of spring' — her face is the season itself.

title: 河渎神
author: 孙光宪
content:
汾水碧依依
黄云落叶初飞
翠娥一去不言归
庙门空掩斜晖
translation:
Fen River, blue-green, rippling
Yellow clouds, leaves beginning to fall
The green beauty left, didn't say she'd return
The temple door, empty, closing the slanting sunlight
annotation: A river, falling leaves, a goddess who left and didn't return. The temple door closes on empty air.孙光宪 writes about absence as a physical space.

title: 后庭花
author: 孙光宪
content:
石城依旧空江国
故宫春色
七尺青螺髻
白如雪
倚阑干
translation:
Stone city, still, empty river kingdom
The old palace's spring colors
Seven-foot green snail bun
White as snow
Leaning on the railing
annotation: A ruined palace, a woman with a towering hair bun. She leans on the railing, white as snow. The kingdom fell, but she remains — beautiful and alone.

title: 思越人
author: 孙光宪
content:
古台平
芳草远
馆娃宫畔寒烟淡
露华浓
恨无穷
translation:
Ancient platform flat
Fragrant grass far
By the Guanwa Palace, cold mist thin
Dew flowers thick
Hate infinite
annotation: An old palace, distant grass, thin mist. The dew is thick, the hate is infinite.孙光宪 compresses a kingdom's fall into five lines.

title: 上行杯
author: 孙光宪
content:
离棹逡巡欲动
临极浦
故人相送
去住心情知不共
金船满捧
绮罗愁
丝管咽
回别
帆影灭
江浪如雪
translation:
The departing oar, hesitating, about to move
Facing the extreme shore
An old friend sees me off
Going and staying — our feelings are not the same
Golden boat full of gifts
Silk and gauze sorrow
Strings and pipes choke
Turning to part
Sail shadow disappears
River waves like snow
annotation: The boat hesitates. A friend waves. Music chokes. The sail disappears. Waves like snow.孙光宪 makes you feel the moment of parting.

title: 杨柳枝
author: 孙光宪
content:
有池有榭即蒙蒙
翻折旋冲陌上风
纵有雨来春更绿
拆条留取系郎踪
translation:
Where there are pools and pavilions, it's misty
Flipping, folding, spinning, rushing on the road's wind
Even if rain comes, spring is greener
Break a branch to tie his traces
annotation: Willows by a pond, misty and green. She breaks a branch to tie his traces — to keep him from leaving. The most literal love charm.

title: 渔歌子
author: 李珣
content:
荻花秋
潇湘夜
橘洲住
小艇如叶
棹入烟波明灭
translation:
Reed flowers, autumn
Xiao and Xiang, night
Orange islet dwelling
Small boat like a leaf
Oar enters the misty waves, appearing and disappearing
annotation: Autumn reeds, night on the river, a leaf-like boat. The oar enters the mist — now you see it, now you don't.李珣 paints disappearance.

title: 南乡子
author: 李珣
content:
烟漠漠
雨凄凄
岸花零落鹧鸪啼
扁舟短棹归兰浦
人去
萧萧竹径透青莎
translation:
Mist, vast and fine
Rain, bitter and cold
Shore flowers fall, partridges cry
Small boat, short oar, returning to the orchid shore
The person gone
Rustling bamboo path, penetrating green sedge
annotation: Mist, rain, falling flowers, crying birds. The boat returns, but the person is gone. Only the bamboo path remains, rustling.

title: 浣溪沙
author: 张泌
content:
独立寒阶望月华
露浓香泛小庭花
绣屏愁背一灯斜
云雨自从分散后
人间无路到仙家
但凭魂梦访天涯
translation:
Alone on cold steps, gazing at the moon's brilliance
Dew thick, fragrance drifting over small courtyard flowers
Embroidered screen, sorrow, back to a slanting lamp
Since the clouds and rain scattered
No road in the world reaches the immortal's home
Only by dream soul visiting the edge of the sky
annotation: Alone, looking at the moon. Flowers, a lamp, a screen. Since they parted, only dreams can reach him. 'Clouds and rain' — the classic Chinese metaphor for love.

title: 蝴蝶儿
author: 张泌
content:
蝴蝶儿
晚春时
阿娇初著淡黄衣
倚窗学画伊
translation:
Butterfly
Late spring
Ah Jiao first wears a pale yellow dress
Leaning on the window, learning to paint it
annotation: A girl in a yellow dress watches a butterfly and tries to paint it. The butterfly is the season, the dress is the season. Everything is spring.

title: 江城子
author: 张泌
content:
浣花溪上见卿卿
脸波明
黛眉轻
绿云高绾
金簇小蜻蜓
好是问他来得么
和笑道
莫多情
translation:
On Washing Flower River, I see you
Face waves bright
Brow light
Green clouds (hair) high-bound
Gold-clustered small dragonflies
I ask: have you come?
She laughs and says: don't be so affectionate
annotation: He sees her by the river. She laughs: 'Don't be so affectionate!' But she's smiling.张泌 captures the dance of flirtation.

title: 酒泉子
author: 张泌
content:
春雨打窗
惊梦觉来天气晓
画堂深
红焰小
背兰釭
translation:
Spring rain hits the window
Startled awake, the sky is dawn
Painted hall deep
Red flame small
Back to the orchid lamp
annotation: Rain wakes her. Dawn comes. The hall is deep, the flame is small. She turns her back to the lamp — and to the day ahead.

title: 生查子
author: 张泌
content:
相见稀
喜相见
相见还相远
檀郎故相恼
越相怜
translation:
Meetings rare
Happy to meet
Meeting, still far apart
The tan lang deliberately teases
The more I pity him
annotation: They rarely meet. When they do, they're still apart. He teases her, and she pities him more. The paradox of love: the more he pushes, the more she cares.

title: 柳枝
author: 张泌
content:
腻粉琼妆透碧纱
雪休夸
金凤镂
红蜡泪
两心花
translation:
Greasy powder, jade makeup, penetrating green silk
Don't boast of snow
Golden phoenix, carved
Red candle tears
Two hearts' flowers
annotation: Makeup, silk, candles, tears. 'Two hearts' flowers' — the only line that matters. Everything else is decoration around the central truth.

title: 南歌子
author: 张泌
content:
柳色遮楼暗
桐花落地香
画堂开处远风凉
高卷水晶帘额
衬斜阳
translation:
Willow color darkens the tower
Tulip flowers fall, fragrant
Where the painted hall opens, distant wind cool
High-rolled crystal curtain
Lining the setting sun
annotation: Willows, falling flowers, a cool wind, a crystal curtain, the setting sun.张泌 paints a perfect afternoon — beautiful and melancholy.

title: 浣溪沙
author: 张泌
content:
钿匣菱花日照临
淡妆成
泪侵寻
别离情
望断关山
translation:
Jewelry box, mirror, sunlight approaches
Light makeup done
Tears, invading
Parting feelings
Gazing until the passes and mountains end
annotation: She puts on light makeup. Tears come anyway. She looks toward the mountains where he's gone. The mirror shows her what she doesn't want to see.
